overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a dimly lit gothic classroom or study hall with students in dark robes seated at wooden desks. The scene features atmospheric lighting, stone architecture with arched windows, and a somber, scholarly atmosphere typical of a medieval castle interior.

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static position overlooking a dimly lit gothic classroom with stone walls and arched windows. Several students in dark robes sit attentively at wooden desks and benches, while dust particles drift through shafts of pale light filtering through the tall windows. The atmosphere is quiet and scholarly, with the stone architecture creating a solemn, medieval ambiance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a dimly lit gothic classroom that emphasizes a solemn and scholarly mood. It begins by overlooking a room of stone walls and arched windows, where students in dark robes sit attentively at wooden desks and benches. As the camera holds its position, pale shafts of light filter through the tall windows, illuminating drifting dust particles in the air. The scene remains fixed on this medieval interior, allowing the quiet ambiance of the stone architecture to define the space.
